nodes.text: Design or improve an AI agent harness, skill router, tool routing, action space, observation format, task-state routing, progressive skill loading, or context-efficient PUSH and PULL capability discovery.
Create, write, package, or update an agent skill with SKILL.md instructions, progressive disclosure, scripts, references, and reusable resources.
Review authentication, authorization, secrets, permissions, user input, dependencies, or sensitive code for security risks.
Implement a feature, bug fix, or refactor with tests first, regression coverage, and verification.
Conduct broad current-state research across multiple primary sources, verify claims, synthesize evidence, and provide citations.
Analyze a market, competitors, pricing, customer segments, industry dynamics, and commercial positioning.
Turn notes or source material into a polished long-form article, tutorial, guide, newsletter, or technical narrative.
Build robust browser end-to-end tests with Playwright, page flows, screenshots, CI execution, and test artifacts.
Plan and implement safe database schema or data migrations with compatibility, backfill, rollback, and zero-downtime controls.
Containerize applications with Docker or Docker Compose, secure images, networking, volumes, health checks, and deployment patterns.
Create investor pitch decks, one-pagers, financial narratives, fundraising memos, accelerator applications, and startup materials.
